channel.title: Discrete Mathematics and Applications
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Discrete Mathematics and Applications

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Andrey V. Menyachikhin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: On the linear disjunctive decomposition of a p-logic function into a product of functions
item.description: Article by Andrey V. Menyachikhin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2025-0001

item.title: Hadamard square of linear codes and the generalized minimal distance of Reed–Muller code of order 2
item.description: Article by Andrey V. Menyachikhin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2025-0002

item.title: Adapted spectral-differential method for construction of differentially 4-uniform piecewise-linear permutations, orthomorphisms, and involutions of the field F2n
item.description: Article by Andrey V. Menyachikhin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2025-0003
